description: MMC Build application (the Supabase-backed product: Comply, Build, Quote, Direct, Train, Billing). Keys an operator needs to run their own instance. Marketing site keys live in mmc-marketing/byok.config.json.
schemaNote: Extends preflight/byok.config.json. New fields this round: scope, destination, provider, phase, secretClass, requiredIf. See SCHEMA FINDINGS at the end of the review for what authoring this surfaced.

services.name: Supabase Project URL
services.description: Your Supabase project — Postgres + Auth + Storage + RLS for the whole app.
instructions: Create (or open) your Supabase project — Sydney region for AU data residency
services.costNote: Free tier fine for pilot; Pro $25/mo at scale.

services.name: Supabase Anon Key
services.description: Public anon key for client-side Supabase calls (RLS-gated).

services.name: Supabase Service Role Key
services.description: Server-side admin key — bypasses RLS. Never expose to the client.
instructions: Same page → 'service_role' → click Reveal → copy (JWT). Server-only, never commit.

services.name: Anthropic (Claude)
services.description: Primary LLM — compliance analysis, cost estimation, plan extraction. Routed via callModel().
instructions: Anthropic Console → Settings → API Keys → Create Key
services.costNote: Pay-as-you-go. BYOK: usage lands on your account.

services.name: OpenAI
services.description: Embeddings (pgvector KB) + GPT cross-validation in the AI router.
instructions: OpenAI → API Keys → Create new secret key

services.name: HuggingFace
services.description: BGE reranking in the AI router. Optional — reranking degrades gracefully if unset.
instructions: HuggingFace → Settings → Access Tokens → New token (read)

services.name: Resend
services.description: Transactional email — drafter/remediation links, notifications, certificates. Also Supabase Auth SMTP.
instructions: Resend → verify a sending domain first

services.name: Resend From Address
services.description: Verified sender on YOUR Resend domain (e.g. noreply@updates.yourdomain.com). Must be a domain you verified above.

services.name: Stripe Secret Key
services.description: Server-side Stripe — checkout, subscriptions, usage metering.
instructions: Stripe → Developers → API keys → reveal Secret key
services.costNote: Stripe takes ~2.9%+30c per charge; no platform fee for test mode.

services.name: Stripe Webhook Signing Secret
services.description: Verifies Stripe webhooks. You must create the endpoint FIRST (needs your deployed URL), then copy the signing secret Stripe generates.
instructions: Deploy the app first so you have a URL
After creating, click the endpoint → reveal 'Signing secret' → copy (whsec_...)

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Comply
services.description: Price ID for the Comply module. Stripe → Products → create a price → copy price_...

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Build
services.description: Price ID for the Build module.

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Quote
services.description: Price ID for the Quote module.

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Direct
services.description: Price ID for the Direct module.

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Train
services.description: Price ID for the Train module.

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Basic bundle
services.description: Legacy bundle price (optional if not selling bundles).

services.name: Stripe Price ID — Professional bundle
services.description: Legacy bundle price (optional).

services.name: Inngest Signing Key
services.description: Async jobs (compliance checks, cost estimation, report gen, nudges). 15 functions + cron.
instructions: Inngest → your env → Manage → Signing Key → copy (signkey-...)
services.costNote: Free tier covers MVP job volume.

services.name: Inngest Event Key
services.description: Sends events into Inngest.

services.name: Mapbox Public Token
services.description: Geocoding + maps for site intelligence (wind region, council, climate).
instructions: Mapbox → Access tokens → copy the default public token (pk....)

services.name: Mapbox Secret Token
services.description: Server-side Mapbox (higher rate limits). Optional — public token covers most paths.

services.name: CloudConvert
services.requiredIf: operator accepts DWG / RVT / SKP / DOC plan uploads
services.description: Converts non-PDF CAD/doc plans to PDF before vision extraction. Skip if you only accept PDFs.

services.name: Platform Trust — Backend URL
services.description: Prompt-injection guard + rate-limit backend (consumer model — hosted by the platform operator). Leave blank and set ENABLE_SECURITY_GATE=false to run without it.

services.name: Platform Trust — Service Key
services.description: Service key for the platform-trust backend.

services.name: Platform Trust — Project ID
services.description: Project ID for the platform-trust backend.

services.name: ElevenLabs Agent ID
services.description: Voice concierge agent (MMC Direct). Optional for v1; falls back to a test agent if unset.
instructions: ElevenLabs → Agents → create/select agent → copy the Agent ID
services.costNote: BYOK: voice usage lands on your ElevenLabs account.

services.name: ABR GUID (ABN Lookup)
services.requiredIf: ABN validation / directory verification is used
services.description: Australian Business Register web-services GUID — validates ABNs in the Direct supplier directory.
instructions: Register for ABR web services → receive a GUID by email

services.name: App URL
services.description: Where this app is deployed (e.g. https://app.mmcbuild.com.au). Used in email links + Stripe redirects.

services.name: Modules Launch List
services.description: Comma-separated modules visible to non-admins (e.g. comply,build,quote). Unset = all visible.

services.name: HubSpot API Key
services.description: CRM sync for directory listings + leads. Optional.

services.name: HeyGen API Key
services.description: Avatar explainer videos for MMC Train. Optional.
